## Description {#description}

Contains in-memory state of S3Queue metadata and currently processed rows per file.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `zookeeper_path` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Path in zookeeper to metadata
- `file_path` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — File path of a file which is being processed
- `file_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — File name of a file which is being processed
- `rows_processed` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Currently processed number of rows
- `status` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Status of processing: Processed, Processing, Failed
- `processing_start_time` ([Nullable(DateTime)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) — Time at which processing of the file started
- `processing_end_time` ([Nullable(DateTime)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) — Time at which processing of the file ended
- `exception` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Exception which happened during processing
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
